subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.HL.TZ2.23
question_html:
0.50 mol of I2 (g) and 0.50 mol of Br2 (g) are placed in a closed flask. The following equilibrium is established.

I2 (g) + Br2 (g) ⇌ 2IBr (g)

The equilibrium mixture contains 0.80 mol of IBr (g). What is the value of Kc?

A.  0.64

B.  1.3

C.  2.6

D.  64
examiners_html: 41% of the candidates were able to calculate Kc given the initial amounts of reactants and the amount of product at equilibrium.
